---
title: "Inventory Management App"
date: 2025-09-02
categories: [Python, Databases, API]
image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/3094041/pexels-photo-3094041.jpeg"
description: Fullstack web application for managing inventory items that provides create, update, search, and delete functions, along with a print function. Made with Flask.
---

![](https://images.pexels.com/photos/3094041/pexels-photo-3094041.jpeg){fig-align="center" width=100%}
*Photo: [cottonbro studio](https://www.pexels.com/@cottonbro) - pexels*


---

## Features
- Create, update, delete, and view products (CRUD operations)
- Search functionality for filtering products
- Backend API built with Flask
- Integration with MySQL database
- Data access layer using DAO pattern

---

## Tools
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Flask-000000?logo=flask&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/SQL-4479A1?logo=mysql&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/HTML5-E34F26?logo=html5&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/JavaScript-F7DF1E?logo=javascript&logoColor=black),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/CSS3-1572B6?logo=css3&logoColor=white)

---

## Application:
[Link](https://luciamacakova.pythonanywhere.com)

---

## More About:
[Github Repository](https://github.com/lmacakova/inventory_management_app)
